title: DeFi and LST on Hyperliquid with @hyperflash_hl
summary_title: HyperFlash: MEV-boosted staking and composable perps on HyperEVM
summary_description: Yale PhD and MIT engineers launch Flash HYPE LST with 0% commission, MEV rewards, and integration across HyperLiquid's DeFi ecosystem.

key_moments.label: HyperFlash co-founders introduce MEV and LST thesis
Explaining HyperCore vs HyperEVM: same consensus, different states
First composable perps: DeFi protocols can hold perp positions directly
LST benefits: liquid staking with borrowing and DeFi composability
MEV definition: maximal extractable value as arbitrage opportunities
HyperFlash differentiator: MEV rewards on top of staking yield
Launch timeline: live within 24-48 hours with point multipliers
Full DeFi integration: partnerships with HyperLend, LoopType, HyperSwap

pull_quote: We are building this for the long run. We will have 0% commission on LST forever, and take a small cut from MEV to hire the best engineers.
